1.translation: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
All praise is due to Allah, Lord of all the worlds
The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
Master of the Day of Judgment
It is You we worship and upon You we rely for help
Guide us to the straight path

1.arabic_text: صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
1.translation: The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have earned Your anger, nor of those who go astray

2.arabic_text: ذَٰلِكَ الْكِتَابُ لَا رَيْبَ ۛ فِيهِ ۛ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
2.translation: This is the Book about which there is no doubt, a guidance for those conscious of Allah

2.arabic_text: الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ الصَّلَاةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
2.translation: Who believe in the unseen, establish prayer, and spend out of what We have provided for them

2.arabic_text: وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِالْآخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
2.translation: And who believe in what has been revealed to you and what was revealed before you, and of the Hereafter they are certain

2.arabic_text: أُولَٰئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ ۖ وَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُفْلِحُونَ
2.translation: Those are upon guidance from their Lord, and it is those who are the successful

3.arabic_text: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
3.translation: Allah - there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence

3.arabic_text: نَزَّلَ عَلَيْكَ الْكِتَابَ بِالْحَقِّ مُصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَأَنزَلَ التَّوْرَاةَ وَالْإِنجِيلَ
3.translation: He has sent down upon you, [O Muhammad], the Book in truth, confirming what was before it. And He revealed the Torah and the Gospel

4.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اتَّقُوا رَبَّكُمُ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُم مِّن نَّفْسٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَخَلَقَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَبَثَّ مِنْهُمَا رِجَالًا كَثِيرًا وَنِسَاءً
4.translation: O mankind, fear your Lord, who created you from one soul and created from it its mate and dispersed from both of them many men and women

5.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا أَوْفُوا بِالْعُقُودِ
5.translation: O you who have believed, fulfill [all] contracts

6.arabic_text: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَجَعَلَ الظُّلُمَاتِ وَالنُّورَ
6.translation: All praise is [due] to Allah, who has created the heavens and the earth and made the darkness and the light

7.arabic_text: الم ۝ ذَٰلِكَ الْكِتَابُ لَا رَيْبَ ۛ فِيهِ ۛ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
7.translation: Alif, Lam, Meem. That is the Book about which there is no doubt, a guidance for those conscious of Allah

8.arabic_text: يَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الْأَنفَالِ ۖ قُلِ الْأَنفَالُ لِلَّهِ وَالرَّسُولِ
8.translation: They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the anfal. Say, 'The anfal are for Allah and the Messenger'

9.arabic_text: بَرَاءَةٌ مِّنَ اللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ إِلَى الَّذِينَ عَاهَدتُّم مِّنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
9.translation: Disavowal from Allah and His Messenger to those with whom you had made a treaty among the polytheists

10.translation: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the wise Book

11.arabic_text: الر ۚ كِتَابٌ أُحْكِمَتْ آيَاتُهُ ثُمَّ فُصِّلَتْ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ خَبِيرٍ
11.translation: Alif, Lam, Ra. [This is] a Book whose verses are perfected and then expounded in detail from [one] who is Wise and Well-Acquainted

12.translation: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the clear Book

13.arabic_text: الم ۖ تِلْكَ آيَاتُ الْكِتَابِ ۗ وَالَّذِي أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ مِن رَّبِّكَ هُوَ الْحَقُّ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
13.translation: Alif, Lam, Meem. These are the verses of the Book, and what has been revealed to you from your Lord is the truth, but most of the people do not believe

14.arabic_text: الر ۚ كِتَابٌ أَنزَلْنَاهُ إِلَيْكَ لِتُخْرِجَ النَّاسَ مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى النُّورِ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَاطِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَمِيدِ
14.translation: Alif, Lam, Ra. [This is] a Book which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], that you might bring forth the people from darkness into light by permission of their Lord

15.arabic_text: الر ۚ تِلْكَ آيَاتُ الْقُرْآنِ وَكِتَابٍ مُّبِينٍ
15.translation: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the Qur'an and a clear Book

16.arabic_text: أَتَىٰ أَمْرُ اللَّهِ فَلَا تَسْتَعْجِلُوهُ ۚ سُبْحَانَهُ وَتَعَالَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
16.translation: The command of Allah is coming, so do not seek to hasten it. Exalted and praised be He above what they associate with Him

17.arabic_text: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي أَسْرَىٰ بِعَبْدِهِ لَيْلًا مِّنَ الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ الْأَقْصَى الَّذِي بَارَكْنَا حَوْلَهُ
17.translation: Exalted is He who took His Servant by night from al-Masjid al-Haram to al-Masjid al-Aqsa, whose surroundings We have blessed

18.arabic_text: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَنزَلَ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِ الْكِتَابَ وَلَمْ يَجْعَل لَّهُ عِوَجًا
18.translation: All praise is [due] to Allah, who has sent down upon His Servant the Book and has not made therein any deviation

19.translation: A mention of the mercy of your Lord to His servant Zechariah
When he called to his Lord with a private supplication

20.arabic_text: طه ۝ مَا أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ لِتَشْقَىٰ
20.translation: Ta, Ha. We have not sent down to you the Qur'an that you be in distress

21.arabic_text: اقْتَرَبَ لِلنَّاسِ حِسَابُهُمْ وَهُمْ فِي غَفْلَةٍ مُّعْرِضُونَ
21.translation: The time of reckoning for the people has drawn near; yet they turn away in heedlessness

22.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اتَّقُوا رَبَّكُمْ ۚ إِنَّ زَلْزَالَ السَّاعَةِ شَيْءٌ عَظِيمٌ
22.translation: O people, fear your Lord. Indeed, the convulsion of the Hour is a tremendous thing

23.arabic_text: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۝ الَّذِينَ هُمْ فِي صَلَاتِهِمْ خَاشِعُونَ
23.translation: Certainly will the believers have succeeded: they who are during their prayer humbly submissive

24.arabic_text: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلْنَاهَا وَفَرَضْنَاهَا وَأَنزَلْنَا فِيهَا آيَاتٍ بَيِّنَاتٍ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
24.translation: This is a surah which We have sent down and made [containing] obligation, and We have revealed in it verses of clear evidence that you might remember

25.arabic_text: تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي نَزَّلَ الْفُرْقَانَ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِ لِيَكُونَ لِلْعَالَمِينَ نَذِيرًا
25.translation: Blessed is the one who sent down the Criterion upon His Servant that he may be to the worlds a warner

26.translation: Ta, Seen, Meem. These are the verses of the clear Book

27.arabic_text: طس ۚ تِلْكَ آيَاتُ الْقُرْآنِ وَكِتَابٍ مُّبِينٍ
27.translation: Ta, Seen. These are the verses of the Qur'an and a clear Book

28.translation: Ta, Seen, Meem. These are the verses of the clear Book

29.arabic_text: الم ۝ أَحَسِبَ النَّاسُ أَن يُتْرَكُوا أَن يَقُولُوا آمَنَّا وَهُمْ لَا يُفْتَنُونَ
29.translation: Alif, Lam, Meem. Do the people think that they will be left alone on saying, 'We believe' and not be tried?

30.arabic_text: الم ۝ غُلِبَتِ الرُّومُ ۝ فِي أَدْنَى الْأَرْضِ وَهُم مِّن بَعْدِ غَلَبِهِمْ سَيَغْلِبُونَ
30.translation: Alif, Lam, Meem. The Romans have been defeated in the nearest land, and after their defeat they will be victorious

31.arabic_text: الم ۝ تِلْكَ آيَاتُ الْكِتَابِ الْحَكِيمِ ۝ هُدًى وَرَحْمَةً لِّلْمُحْسِنِينَ
31.translation: Alif, Lam, Meem. These are the verses of the wise Book, a guidance and mercy for the doers of good

32.arabic_text: الم ۝ تَنزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهِ مِن رَّبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
32.translation: Alif, Lam, Meem. The revelation of the Book is from Allah, in which there is no doubt, from the Lord of the worlds

33.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ اتَّقِ اللَّهَ وَلَا تُطِعِ الْكَافِرِينَ وَالْمُنَافِقِينَ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
33.translation: O Prophet, fear Allah and do not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise

34.arabic_text: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ فِي الْآخِرَةِ ۚ وَهُوَ الْحَكِيمُ الْخَبِيرُ
34.translation: All praise is due to Allah to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth, and to Him belongs all praise in the Hereafter. And He is the Wise, the Acquainted

35.arabic_text: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ فَاطِرِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ جَاعِلِ الْمَلَائِكَةِ رُسُلًا أُولِي أَجْنِحَةٍ مَّثْنَىٰ وَثُلَاثَ وَرُبَاعَ
35.translation: All praise is [due] to Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, [who] made the angels messengers having wings, two or three or four

36.translation: Ya, Seen. By the wise Qur'an

37.arabic_text: وَالصَّافَّاتِ صَفًّا ۝ فَالزَّاجِرَاتِ زَجْرًا ۝ فَالتَّالِيَاتِ ذِكْرًا
37.translation: By those [angels] lined up in rows and those who drive [the clouds] forcefully and those who recite the message

38.translation: Sad. By the Qur'an, full of remembrance

39.arabic_text: تَنزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ
39.translation: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

40.arabic_text: حمۚ ۝ تَنزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ
40.translation: Ha, Meem. The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the All-Knowing

41.arabic_text: حمۚ ۝ السَّجْدَةُ ۝ تَنزِيلٌ مِّنَ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
41.translation: Ha, Meem. A revelation from the Most Merciful, the Merciful

42.arabic_text: حمۚ ۝ عسقۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُوحِي إِلَيْكَ وَإِلَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكَ اللَّهُ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
42.translation: Ha, Meem. Ain, Seen, Qaf. Thus does He reveal to you and to those before you - Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

43.arabic_text: حمۚ ۝ وَالْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ ۝ إِنَّا أَنزَلْنَاهُ فِي لَيْلَةٍ مُّبَارَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
43.translation: Ha, Meem. By the clear Book, indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind]

44.arabic_text: حمۚ ۝ وَالْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ ۝ إِنَّا أَنزَلْنَاهُ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ ۝ وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ
44.translation: Ha, Meem. By the clear Book, we have sent it down in the night of the decree. So what can make you understand what is the night of decree?

45.arabic_text: حمۚ ۝ تَنزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ
45.translation: Ha, Meem. The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

46.translation: Ha, Meem. A revelation from the Most Merciful, the Merciful

47.arabic_text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ ۝ وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةً لِّلْعَالَمِينَ
47.translation: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. And We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], except as a mercy to the worlds

48.arabic_text: إِنَّا فَتَحْنَا لَكَ فَتْحًا مُّبِينًا ۝ لِيَغْفِرَ لَكَ اللَّهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِن ذَنبِكَ وَمَا تَأَخَّرَ
48.translation: Indeed, We have given you, [O Muhammad], a clear conquest, that Allah may forgive for you what preceded of your sin and what will follow

49.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تُقَدِّمُوا بَيْنَ يَدَيِ اللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ ۖ وَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ
49.translation: O you who believe, do not put [yourself] before Allah and His Messenger but fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Hearing and Knowing

51.arabic_text: وَالذَّارِيَاتِ ذَرْوًا ۝ فَالْحَامِلَاتِ وِقْرًا ۝ فَالْجَارِيَاتِ يُسْرًا ۝ فَالْمُقَسِّمَاتِ أَمْرًا
51.translation: By those [winds and clouds] that scatter widely and those [clouds] that bear the load [of rain], and those [ships] that sail with ease

52.arabic_text: وَالطُّورِ ۝ وَكِتَابٍ مَّسْطُورٍ ۝ فِي رَقٍّ مَّنشُورٍ ۝ وَالْبَيْتِ الْمَعْمُورِ ۝ وَالسَّقْفِ الْمَرْفُوعِ ۝ وَالْبَحْرِ الْمَسْجُورِ
52.translation: By the Mount and by a Qur'an inscribed in parchment spread out, and by the House [the Ka'bah], constantly filled [with visitors], and by the elevated roof

53.arabic_text: وَالنَّجْمِ إِذَا هَوَىٰ ۝ مَا ضَلَّ صَاحِبُكُمْ وَمَا غَوَىٰ
53.translation: By the star when it descends, your companion [Muhammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred

54.arabic_text: وَالْقَمَرِ إِذَا تَلَاهَا ۝ وَاللَّيْلِ إِذْ أَدْبَرَ ۝ وَالصُّبْحِ إِذَا أَسْفَرَ
54.translation: By the moon when it follows the sun, and the night when it covers it, and the day when it displays it

55.arabic_text: الرَّحْمَٰنُ ۝ عَلَّمَ الْقُرْآنَ ۝ خَلَقَ الْإِنسَانَ ۝ عَلَّمَهُ الْبَيَانَ
55.translation: The Most Merciful. Taught the Qur'an. Created man. Taught him eloquence

56.arabic_text: إِذَا وَقَعَتِ الْوَاقِعَةُ ۝ لَيْسَ لِوَقْعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌ
56.translation: When the event occurs, there is no denial of its occurrence, bringing down [some] and raising up [others]

57.arabic_text: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
57.translation: Whatever is in the heavens and earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

58.arabic_text: قَدْ سَمِعَ اللَّهُ قَوْلَ الَّتِي تُجَادِلُكَ فِي زَوْجِهَا وَتَشْتَكِي إِلَى اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ يَسْمَعُ تَحَاوُرَكُمَا ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ سَمِيعٌ بَصِيرٌ
58.translation: Allah has heard the statement of the one who argues with you, [O Muhammad], concerning her husband and directs her complaint to Allah. And Allah hears your dialogue; indeed, Allah is Hearing and Seeing

59.arabic_text: سَمِعَ اللَّهُ قَوْلَ الَّذِينَ قَالُوا إِنَّ اللَّهَ فَقِيرٌ وَنَحْنُ أَغْنِيَاءُ ۘ سَنَكْتُبُ مَا قَالُوا وَقَتْلَهُمُ الْأَنبِيَاءَ بِغَيْرِ حَقٍّ
59.translation: Allah has heard the statement of those [Jews] who said, 'Indeed, Allah is poor and we are rich.' We will record what they said and their killing of the prophets without right

60.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تَتَّخِذُوا عَدُوِّي وَعَدُوَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَاءَ تُلْقُونَ إِلَيْهِم بِالْمَوَدَّةِ وَقَدْ كَفَرُوا بِمَا جَاءَكُم مِّنَ الْحَقِّ
60.translation: O you who believe, do not take My enemies and your enemies as allies, extending to them affection while they have disbelieved in what came to you of the truth

61.arabic_text: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
61.translation: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise

62.arabic_text: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ الْمَلِكُ الْقُدُّوسُ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
62.translation: Whatever is in the heavens and earth exalts Allah, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

63.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لِمَ تَقُولُونَ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
63.translation: O you who believe, why do you say what you do not do?

64.translation: Every soul will be held in pledge for what it has earned

65.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ إِذَا طَلَّقْتُمُ النِّسَاءَ فَطَلِّقُوهُنَّ لِعِدَّتِهِنَّ وَأَحْصُوا الْعِدَّةَ ۖ وَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ رَبَّكُمْ
65.translation: O Prophet, when you [Muslims] divorce women, divorce them for [the commencement of] their waiting period and keep count of the waiting periods, and fear Allah, your Lord

66.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ لِمَ تُحَرِّمُ مَا أَحَلَّ اللَّهُ لَكَ ۖ تَبْتَغِي مَرْضَاتَ أَزْوَاجِكَ ۚ وَاللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
66.translation: O Prophet, why do you prohibit [yourself from] what Allah has made lawful to you, seeking the approval of your wives? And Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

67.arabic_text: تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي بِيَدِهِ الْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
67.translation: Blessed is He in whose hand is the dominion, and He over all things is competent

68.translation: Nun. By the pen and what the angels inscribe

69.arabic_text: الْحَاقَّةُ ۝ مَا الْحَاقَّةُ ۝ وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا الْحَاقَّةُ
69.translation: The Reality. What is the Reality? And what will make you know what is the Reality?

70.arabic_text: سَأَلَ سَائِلٌ بِعَذَابٍ وَاقِعٍ ۝ لِّلْكَافِرِينَ لَيْسَ لَهُ دَافِعٌ
70.translation: A questioner asked about a punishment bound to happen to the disbelievers, which none can avert

71.arabic_text: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ أَن أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
71.translation: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], 'Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment'

72.arabic_text: قُلْ أُوحِيَ إِلَيَّ أَنَّهُ اسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌ مِّنَ الْجِنِّ فَقَالُوا إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْآنًا عَجَبًا
72.translation: Say, 'It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened [to the Qur'an]' and said, 'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur'an'

73.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُزَّمِّلُ ۝ قُمِ اللَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا ۝ نِصْفَهُ أَوِ انقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا ۝ أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ الْقُرْآنَ تَرْتِيلًا
73.translation: O you wrapped in garments, arise and warn! And your Lord glorify, and your clothing purify, and uncleanliness avoid

74.arabic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُدَّثِّرُ ۝ قُمْ فَأَنذِرْ ۝ وَرَبَّكَ فَكَبِّرْ ۝ وَثِيَابَكَ فَطَهِّرْ ۝ وَالرِّجْزَ فَاهْجُرْ
74.translation: O you who are clothed, arise and warn! And magnify, [O Muhammad], your Lord, and purify your clothing, and uncleanliness avoid

75.arabic_text: لَا أُقْسِمُ بِيَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ ۝ وَلَا أُقْسِمُ بِالنَّفْسِ اللَّوَّامَةِ
75.translation: I swear by the Day of Resurrection. And I swear by the blaming soul

76.arabic_text: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى الْإِنسَانِ حِينٌ مِّنَ الدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْئًا مَّذْكُورًا
76.translation: Has there come upon man ever a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?

77.arabic_text: وَالْمُرْسَلَاتِ عُرْفًا ۝ فَالْعَاصِفَاتِ عَصْفًا ۝ وَالنَّاشِرَاتِ نَشْرًا ۝ فَالْفَارِقَاتِ فَرْقًا ۝ فَالْمُلْقِيَاتِ ذِكْرًا
77.translation: By those [winds] sent forth in succession, those that blow violently forward and those that scatter wind-borne pollen, those [angels] who distinguish between matters as commanded to them and carry out the orders of [their] Lord

78.arabic_text: عَمَّ يَتَسَاءَلُونَ ۝ عَنِ النَّبَإِ الْعَظِيمِ ۝ الَّذِي هُمْ فِيهِ مُخْتَلِفُونَ
78.translation: About what are they asking one another? About the great news, which they are in disagreement concerning?

79.arabic_text: وَالنَّازِعَاتِ غَرْقًا ۝ وَالنَّاشِطَاتِ نَشْطًا ۝ وَالسَّابِحَاتِ سَبْحًا ۝ فَالسَّابِقَاتِ سَبْقًا ۝ فَالْمُدَبِّرَاتِ أَمْرًا
79.translation: By those [angels] who tear out [the soul of the disbeliever] by force; by those [angels] who gently remove [the soul of the believer]; and by those [angels] who glide [as if] swimming and those who race each other in a race and those who arrange each matter

80.translation: He frowned and turned away because the blind man came to him [while he was preoccupied]

81.arabic_text: إِذَا الشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ ۝ وَإِذَا النُّجُومُ انكَدَرَتْ ۝ وَإِذَا الْجِبَالُ سُيِّرَتْ
81.translation: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness] and when the stars fall, scattering, and when the mountains are moved away

82.arabic_text: إِذَا السَّمَاءُ انفَطَرَتْ ۝ وَإِذَا الْكَوَاكِبُ انتَثَرَتْ ۝ وَإِذَا الْبِحَارُ فُجِّرَتْ
82.translation: When the heaven is split open and when the stars have scattered and when the seas are burst forth and when the graves are overturned

83.arabic_text: وَيْلٌ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ ۝ الَّذِينَ إِذَا اكْتَالُوا عَلَى النَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ ۝ وَإِذَا كَالُوهُمْ أَو وَّزَنُوهُمْ يُخْسِرُونَ
83.translation: Woe to those who give less [than due]. Those who, when they take a measure from people, take in full. But if they give by measure or by weight to [these] people, they cause loss

84.arabic_text: إِذَا السَّمَاءُ انشَقَّتْ ۝ وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ ۝ وَإِذَا الْأَرْضُ مُدَّتْ ۝ وَأَلْقَتْ مَا فِيهَا وَتَخَلَّتْ
84.translation: When the heaven is split asunder, and hearkens to its Lord, and it must do so; and when the earth is flattened out, and casts forth what is within it and becomes empty

85.arabic_text: وَالسَّمَاءِ ذَاتِ الْبُرُوجِ ۝ وَالْيَوْمِ الْمَوْعُودِ ۝ وَشَاهِدٍ وَمَشْهُودٍ
85.translation: By the sky containing great stars, and by the Day Promised, and by the witness and the witnessed

86.arabic_text: وَالسَّمَاءِ وَالطَّارِقِ ۝ وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا الطَّارِقُ ۝ النَّجْمُ الثَّاقِبُ
86.translation: By the sky and the nightcomer - and what can make you know what is the nightcomer? It is the piercing star

87.arabic_text: سَبِّحِ اسْمَ رَبِّكَ الْأَعْلَىٰ ۝ الَّذِي خَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ ۝ وَالَّذِي قَدَّرَ فَهَدَىٰ
87.translation: Glorify the name of your Lord, the Most High, who has created and proportioned, and who has destined and [then] guided

88.arabic_text: هَلْ أَتَاكَ حَدِيثُ الْغَاشِيَةِ ۝ وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَاشِعَةٌ ۝ عَامِلَةٌ نَّاصِبَةٌ
88.translation: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming Calamity? Some faces, that Day, will be humbled, labouring, weary

89.arabic_text: وَالْفَجْرِ ۝ وَلَيَالٍ عَشْرٍ ۝ وَالشَّفْعِ وَالْوِتْرِ ۝ وَاللَّيْلِ إِذَا يَسْرِ
89.translation: By the dawn and by ten nights, and by the even and the odd, and by the night when it passes, is there not in that an oath for those of understanding?

90.arabic_text: لَا أُقْسِمُ بِهَٰذَا الْبَلَدِ ۝ وَأَنتَ حِلٌّ بِهَٰذَا الْبَلَدِ ۝ وَوَالِدٍ وَمَا وَلَدَ
90.translation: I swear by this city, and you, [O Muhammad], are free from restriction in this city, and by the father and what he begat

91.arabic_text: وَالشَّمْسِ وَضُحَاهَا ۝ وَالْقَمَرِ إِذَا تَلَاهَا ۝ وَالنَّهَارِ إِذَا جَلَّاهَا ۝ وَاللَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَاهَا
91.translation: By the sun and its brightness, and by the moon when she follows it, and by the day when it displays it, and by the night when it covers it

92.arabic_text: وَاللَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰ ۝ وَالنَّهَارِ إِذَا تَجَلَّىٰ ۝ وَمَا خَلَقَ الذَّكَرَ وَالْأُنثَىٰ
92.translation: By the night when it covers, and by the day when it appears, and by He who created male and female

93.arabic_text: وَالضُّحَىٰ ۝ وَاللَّيْلِ إِذَا سَجَىٰ ۝ مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ
93.translation: By the forenoon and by the night when it is still, your Lord has not forsaken you, [O Muhammad], nor does He hate you

94.arabic_text: أَلَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ ۝ وَوَضَعْنَا عَنكَ وِزْرَكَ ۝ الَّذِي أَنقَضَ ظَهْرَكَ
94.translation: Have We not opened for you your breast? And removed from you your burden which had weighed upon your back

95.arabic_text: وَالتِّينِ وَالزَّيْتُونِ ۝ وَطُورِ سِينِينَ ۝ وَهَٰذَا الْبَلَدِ الْأَمِينِ
95.translation: By the fig and the olive, and by Mount Sinai, and by this city of security

96.arabic_text: اقْرَأْ بِاسْمِ رَبِّكَ الَّذِي خَلَقَ ۝ خَلَقَ الْإِنسَانَ مِنْ عَلَقٍ ۝ اقْرَأْ وَرَبُّكَ الْأَكْرَمُ
96.translation: Read in the name of your Lord who created - created humans from a clot. Read, and your Lord is the most generous

97.arabic_text: إِنَّا أَنزَلْنَاهُ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ ۝ وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ ۝ لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
97.translation: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Power. And what can make you know what is the Night of Power? The Night of Power is better than a thousand months

98.arabic_text: لَمْ يَكُنِ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا مِنْ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ وَالْمُشْرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأْتِيَهُمُ الْبَيِّنَةُ
98.translation: Those who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists were not to be parted [from their way] until there came to them clear evidence

99.arabic_text: إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ الْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا ۝ وَأَخْرَجَتِ الْأَرْضُ أَثْقَالَهَا ۝ وَقَالَ الْإِنسَانُ مَا لَهَا
99.translation: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake, and the earth discharges its burdens, and man says, 'What is [wrong] with it?'

100.arabic_text: وَالْعَادِيَاتِ ضَبْحًا ۝ فَالْمُورِيَاتِ قَدْحًا ۝ فَالْمُغِيرَاتِ صُبْحًا ۝ فَأَثَرْنَ بِهِ نَقْعًا ۝ فَوَسَطْنَ بِهِ جَمْعًا
100.translation: By the coursers [horses] breathing heavily, producing sparks of fire, and those galloping to battle at dawn, raising clouds of dust thereby

101.arabic_text: الْقَارِعَةُ ۝ مَا الْقَارِعَةُ ۝ وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا الْقَارِعَةُ
101.translation: The striking calamity! What is the striking calamity? And what can make you know what is the striking calamity?

102.translation: Competition in [worldly] increase diverts you, until you visit the graveyards

103.arabic_text: وَالْعَصْرِ ۝ إِنَّ الْإِنسَانَ لَفِي خُسْرٍ ۝ إِلَّا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا بِالْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا بِالصَّبْرِ
103.translation: By the time. Indeed, mankind is in loss, except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience

104.arabic_text: وَيْلٌ لِّكُلِّ هُمَزَةٍ لُّمَزَةٍ ۝ الَّذِي جَمَعَ مَالًا وَعَدَّدَهُ ۝ يَحْسَبُ أَنَّ مَالَهُ أَخْلَدَهُ
104.translation: Woe to every scorner and mocker, who has gathered wealth and keeps counting it, thinking that his wealth will make him immortal

105.arabic_text: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَابِ الْفِيلِ ۝ أَلَمْ يَجْعَلْ كَيْدَهُمْ فِي تَضْلِيلٍ
105.translation: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?

106.arabic_text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ ۝ لِإِيلَافِ قُرَيْشٍ ۝ إِيلَافِهِمْ رِحْلَةَ الشِّتَاءِ وَالصَّيْفِ ۝ فَلْيَعْبُدُوا رَبَّ هَٰذَا الْبَيْتِ
106.translation: For the habituation of Quraysh, their habituation [to travel] in the season of winter and summer - so let them worship the Lord of this House

107.arabic_text: أَرَأَيْتَ الَّذِي يُكَذِّبُ بِالدِّينِ ۝ فَذَٰلِكَ الَّذِي يَدُعُّ الْيَتِيمَ ۝ وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ الْمِسْكِينِ
107.translation: Have you seen the one who denies the religion? For that is the one who drives away the orphan and does not encourage the feeding of the poor

108.arabic_text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ ۝ إِنَّا أَعْطَيْنَاكَ الْكَوْثَرَ ۝ فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَانْحَرْ ۝ إِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ الْأَبْتَرُ
108.translation: Indeed, We have given you al-Kawthar. So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him]. Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off

109.arabic_text: قُلْ يَا أَيُّهَا الْكَافِرُونَ ۝ لَا أَعْبُدُ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ ۝ وَلَا أَنتُمْ عَابِدُونَ مَا أَعْبُدُ ۝ وَلَا أَنَا عَابِدٌ مَّا عَبَدتُّمْ ۝ وَلَا أَنتُمْ عَابِدُونَ مَا أَعْبُدُ ۝ لَكُمْ دِينُكُمْ وَلِيَ دِينِ
109.translation: Say, 'O disbelievers! I do not worship what you worship. Nor are you worshippers of what I worship. Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship. Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship. For you is your religion, and for me is my religion'

110.arabic_text: إِذَا جَاءَ نَصْرُ اللَّهِ وَالْفَتْحُ ۝ وَرَأَيْتَ النَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا ۝ فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَاسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ تَوَّابًا
110.translation: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest, and you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes, then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him

111.arabic_text: تَبَّتْ يَدَا أَبِي لَهَبٍ وَتَبَّ ۝ مَا أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُ وَمَا كَسَبَ ۝ سَيَصْلَىٰ نَارًا ذَاتَ لَهَبٍ ۝ وَامْرَأَتُهُ حَمَّالَةَ الْحَطَبِ ۝ فِي جِيدِهَا حَبْلٌ مِّن مَّسَدٍ
111.translation: Perish the hands of Abu Lahab, and perish he! His wealth avails him not, nor what he has earned. He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame and his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood, around her neck a rope of [twisted] fiber

112.arabic_text: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ۝ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ۝ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ۝ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
112.translation: Say, 'He is Allah, [who is] One, Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is born, nor is there to Him any equivalent'

113.arabic_text: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ ۝ مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ ۝ وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ ۝ وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ ۝ وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
113.translation: Say, 'I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak from the evil of that which He has created and from the evil of darkness when it settles and from the evil of the blowers in knots and from the evil of an envier when he envies'

114.arabic_text: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ ۝ مَلِكِ النَّاسِ ۝ إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ ۝ الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
114.translation: Say, 'I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the Sovereign of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the retreating whisperer - who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind - from among the jinn and mankind'
